hero.subtitle: The Sahur Meme Coin of Falco-X
hero.shareText: Just discovered $TUNG 🍹💸 The Sahur meme coin on Falco-X. WAKE UP AND BUY TUNG! 🚀🌙

whyTung.label: The Power of TUNG
whyTung.subtitle: The memecoin that rewards holders, builds community, and leverages the Falco-X ecosystem for real value.
whyTung.card1Desc: TUNG captures the unstoppable power of the Tung Tung Sahur meme culture. Built to spread like wildfire across crypto Twitter and beyond.
whyTung.card2Desc: Hold TUNG and earn 3% rewards automatically from every transaction. Your stack grows while you sleep — just like Sahur energy.
whyTung.card3Desc: TUNG is powered by the Falco-X ecosystem, providing real utility, shareholder dividends, and long-term sustainability beyond memes.

tokenomics.label: Token Distribution
tokenomics.title: Tokenomics
tokenomics.subtitle: Total supply strategically allocated for long-term growth, community rewards, and ecosystem sustainability.
tokenomics.supplyNote: 100% of TUNG supply distributed with full transparency
tokenomics.securityDesc: Development tokens are locked on PinkSale and verifiable on-chain. If trading fees cover operational costs, locked tokens are redirected to boost staking APR and burns — always prioritizing the community.
tokenomics.lpLockTitle: Open the liquidity lock record and verify the locked LP
tokenomics.lpLockDesc: TUNG's core liquidity is locked on PinkSale for 2 years and can be verified in seconds. This gives buyers a clear trust signal and proves the LP is protected on-chain.
tokenomics.lpLockCardDesc: Liquidity pool locked on PinkSale — verifiable on-chain. Ensures TUNG's trading pair is safe and cannot be rug-pulled.
tokenomics.lock1Desc: Development allocation locked on PinkSale. Verifiable on-chain lock record. Cannot be accessed prematurely.
tokenomics.lock2Desc: Additional development reserve locked. Full vesting schedule enforced by smart contract. Community safety first.
tokenomics.commitmentDesc: If trading fees generate enough revenue to cover operational expenses, locked development and marketing tokens will NOT be sold — they will be redirected to boost staking APR and increase token burns instead. Lock periods can be extended at any time for additional security. Nothing is touched without community benefit.

passiveIncome.label: Earn While You Hold
passiveIncome.subtitle: Hold TUNG and earn rewards automatically from market activity.
passiveIncome.subtitle2: Your wallet grows while you sleep.
passiveIncome.stat2Desc: Earnings accumulate automatically with every trade
passiveIncome.stat3Desc: Community expands with every viral moment
passiveIncome.stat4Desc: The community never sleeps — neither do your rewards
passiveIncome.ctaDesc: Every buy and sell transaction automatically contributes to your wallet. No staking required. No lockups. Pure passive income.
passiveIncome.stakingDesc: 3,000,000 TUNG allocated for staking rewards. Stake your TUNG on Falco-X Swap and earn additional yield on top of passive reflections. Double rewards, zero lockups.

viralMeme.label: The Meme Energy
viralMeme.subtitle: TUNG isn't just a coin — it's a movement. Born from the legendary Tung Tung Sahur meme culture, designed to unite degens and believers alike.
viralMeme.tralaleroLine: Tung Tung Sahur... Tralalero Tralalá. The meme economy is real.
viralMeme.swapCtaSub: Swap BNB for $TUNG. Start earning 3% passive rewards instantly.

roadmap.label: Our Journey
roadmap.title: Roadmap

roadmap.phase1Desc: Token launch on Falco-X. Community formation. Initial meme propagation.
roadmap.phase2Desc: Building the TUNG army. Social expansion. Holder milestones.

roadmap.phase6Desc: Play-to-earn strategy game on BNB Chain inspired by Travian. Mine resources, trade P2P in marketplace, battle with heroes, stake TUNG as governance token. Reward pools for top players.

howToBuy.label: Start Here
howToBuy.subtitle: Just 3 steps. No complications. Straight to the moon.
howToBuy.step1Desc: Download Phantom or MetaMask. Set up your wallet in under 1 minute. Keep your seed phrase safe.
howToBuy.step2Desc: Buy BNB on your favorite exchange (Binance, Coinbase, etc.) and send it to your wallet.
howToBuy.step3Desc: Connect your wallet to Falco-X Swap, paste TUNG's CA and swap. Done, you're a holder!

community.label: Join the Movement
community.title: Community
community.subtitle: The TUNG army is growing. Don't get left behind.
community.tagline: TUNG holders are building the future — one Sahur at a time.
community.swapCtaDesc: Buy $TUNG on Falco-X Swap. Connect your wallet and swap BNB for TUNG in seconds.

novaGame.label: Play-to-Earn Strategy Game
novaGame.subtitle: TUNG is the governance token of NOVA — a massive multiplayer strategy game on BNB Chain. Build your empire, trade resources, conquer fortresses, and earn real rewards.
novaGame.heroTitle: Command Your Empire. Earn with TUNG.
novaGame.heroDesc: NOVA is a massive multiplayer strategy game where every decision matters. Your home planet generates infinite resources. Colonize, build, research, trade, and battle — all powered by TUNG as the in-game currency.
novaGame.ctaFooter: The universe is expanding. New planets are discovered every day. Will you build the greatest empire in NOVA?
novaGame.mechanicsSub: Seven core mechanics that shape your galactic journey

homePlanet.title: Home Planet — Infinite Resources
homePlanet.desc: Your capital world never runs out. It's your eternal base — rebuild, regroup, and launch new campaigns from here.

colonize.title: Colonize & Abandon
colonize.desc: Each colony has limited metal, crystal, and deuterium. Once depleted, abandon it and move on. The map renews itself.

build.title: Build, Research, Produce
build.desc: Construct buildings, research technologies, and build fleets. Everything costs resources — manage them wisely.

explore.title: Explore, Trade, Attack
explore.desc: Three ways to get what you need. The marketplace is P2P — players sell to players. Real strategy, real economy.

alliances.title: Alliances & Fortresses
alliances.desc: Join forces, conquer fortresses, and earn automatic rewards from the game's jackpot pool.

economy.title: TUNG-Powered Economy
economy.desc: Buy, sell, earn rewards — everything runs on TUNG. It's the real token powering the entire NOVA ecosystem.

rewards.title: Reward Pools
rewards.desc: Every trade and Plus purchase feeds 4 funds: explorers, top rankings, fortress alliances, and destroyers. Play well, earn more.

whitepaper.label: Official Document
whitepaper.subtitle: The Sahur Meme Coin of Falco-X — Built on BNB Chain
whitepaper.section1P1: TUNG is a community-driven meme coin launched on BNB Smart Chain (BSC), born from the viral Tung Tung Sahur internet culture. Unlike traditional meme coins that rely solely on hype, TUNG introduces a self-sustaining economic model that rewards holders, burns supply, and builds long-term value through the Falco-X ecosystem.
whitepaper.section1P2: TUNG is not just a token — it is a cultural movement fused with deflationary tokenomics. Every transaction fuels three core mechanisms: passive income for holders, automatic token burns, and liquidity reinforcement.
whitepaper.section1Quote: The community never sleeps. Neither do your rewards.
whitepaper.section2P1: Tung Tung Sahur is a genuine viral phenomenon that swept across social media — Telegram, X (Twitter), and TikTok. The most successful meme coins in history share one common thread: authentic cultural roots.
whitepaper.section2P2: The viral audio Tralalero Tralalá has become the unofficial anthem of the TUNG community. The moon emoji 🌙 — central to TUNG's identity — symbolizes both the Sahur tradition and the universal crypto aspiration: to the moon.
whitepaper.section3P1: TUNG's total supply is strategically allocated to ensure long-term sustainability, community growth, and ecosystem health.
whitepaper.section3Transparency: 100% of the TUNG supply is distributed with full on-chain transparency. The 53% liquidity pool allocation is locked. Development tokens verifiable on PinkSale.
whitepaper.section4P1: TUNG implements a transaction tax on every buy and sell. This tax is the engine that powers the entire TUNG economy.

section4Phase1Rows.purpose: Distributed proportionally to all TUNG holders
Fuels growth campaigns, ecosystem expansion, and liquidity

whitepaper.section4ReductionDesc: As TUNG achieves key milestones — exchange listings, holder targets, and ecosystem maturity — the transaction tax will be reduced from 6% to 3%. Lower tax means higher trading velocity, attracting new investors while maintaining core reward and burn mechanisms.

section4Phase2Rows.purpose: Continued passive income for the community

whitepaper.section4Commitment: The tax reduction is a credible commitment to the community: early holders benefit from higher reflections during the growth phase, while the reduced tax in the maturity phase attracts mainstream trading volume.
whitepaper.section5P1: TUNG uses a reflection (rebase) mechanism — not traditional staking.
section5Items: No lockups. Your tokens stay in your wallet.
No minimum. Hold $10 or $10,000 — you earn proportionally.
No action required. Rewards arrive automatically.
Compound effect. As trading volume grows, so do your rewards.
whitepaper.section5Example: If you hold 1% of the TUNG supply and someone makes a $10,000 trade, the 3% dividend tax generates $300 in rewards. Of that, $3 goes directly to your wallet — instantly.
whitepaper.section5StakingDesc: 3,000,000 TUNG have been allocated for staking rewards on Falco-X Swap. Stake your tokens at swap.falcox.net/staking to earn additional yield on top of automatic reflections — double the earnings, zero extra effort.
whitepaper.section6P1: TUNG is a deflationary token. On every transaction, a portion of the tax is sent to the dead wallet, permanently removing tokens from circulation.
whitepaper.section6P2: TUNG launched with 2,000,000 tokens pre-burned. Less supply + growing demand = upward price pressure.
whitepaper.section6Verify: All burned tokens are visible on-chain. Verify at BSCScan.
whitepaper.section7P1: TUNG is built within the Falco-X ecosystem — a growing network of DeFi tools, swap infrastructure, and community-driven projects on BNB Chain.
section7Items: Swap infrastructure — TUNG trades on Falco-X Swap with deep liquidity.
Ecosystem synergies — Cross-pollination with other Falco-X projects.
Shareholder dividends — Falco-X ecosystem revenue benefits flow to stakeholders.
Long-term sustainability — Beyond memes, TUNG has real infrastructure.

section8Phases.title: Launch & Community Formation
section8Phases.desc: Token launch on Falco-X. Community building. 2,000,000 tokens pre-burned.

section8Phases.title: Community Growth
section8Phases.desc: Building the TUNG army. Social expansion. First holder milestones.

section8Phases.title: Viral Campaigns & Influencers
section8Phases.desc: Massive meme campaigns. Influencer collaborations. Tax reduction proposal.

section8Phases.title: Exchange Listings
section8Phases.desc: CEX and DEX listings. Enhanced liquidity. Tax reduction to 3% executed.

section8Phases.title: Falco-X Expansion & Cross-Chain
section8Phases.desc: Deep ecosystem integration. Cross-chain expansion. Global dominance.

section9Items: On-Chain Verification — every transaction visible on BSCScan.
Falco-X Infrastructure — built on audited swap infrastructure.
No Mint Function — supply is fixed. No new tokens can be created.
Community Governance Path — future voting on key decisions.
section10Steps: Get a BNB Chain wallet — MetaMask or Trust Wallet.
Acquire BNB on Binance, Coinbase, etc. Transfer to BSC wallet.
Connect to Falco-X Swap at swap.falcox.net.
Swap BNB for TUNG. Set slippage to 6-8% (covers 6% tax).
Hold & Earn — Your balance grows automatically. Welcome to Sahur.
whitepaper.section11P1: TUNG is a meme coin created for entertainment and community purposes. This whitepaper does not constitute financial advice. Cryptocurrency investments involve substantial risk. Always DYOR.
whitepaper.section11P2: The tax reduction from 6% to 3% is a project goal subject to market conditions and community consensus. It is not a contractual guarantee.
